## Vault Change Type

- [ ] Inbox / scratch note
- [ ] Decision
- [ ] Architecture
- [ ] Runbook
- [ ] Conflict cleanup

## Checks

- [ ] `python scripts/vault_collab_lint.py --vault .` passes
- [ ] No Obsidian workspace/cache/trash files are committed
- [ ] No sync conflict files are committed
- [ ] Protected docs were reviewed by an owner
